```{r}

###visualize data

my_data <- read_csv("./data/se_groups.csv")

ggplot(data = my_data) + 
  geom_bar(mapping = aes(x = vowel_bias, fill = group))



ggplot(data = my_data) + 
  geom_bar(mapping = aes(x = stop_bias, fill = group))
```
ggplot(data = my_data) + geom_boxplot(aes(x = group, y = lextale))

ggplot(data = my_data) + geom_point(x = , y = group, color = vowel_bias)

mean(my_data$lextale)
```
